title: gymnadenia × heufleri
intro: Gymnadenia × heufleri, also known as Heufler's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Gymnadenia densiflora. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Gymnadenia × heufleri can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
